title: quercus durandii var. breviloba
intro: Quercus durandii var. breviloba, also known as the Chinese cork oak or short-lobed durand oak, is a deciduous tree species native to China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus durandii var. breviloba include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and acting as an antiseptic. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and extracts that can be used to treat various ailments.
